title: Cetirizine
summary: Cetirizine is used to  relieve sneezing; runny nose; itchy, red, watery eyes; and itchy nose or throat due to allergies. Cetirizine is also used to treat itching and redness caused by hives. Cetirizine is in a class of medications called antihistamines. It works by blocking the action of histamine, a substance in the body that causes allergic symptoms. Cetirizine is also available in combination with pseudoephedrine. This monograph only includes information about the use of cetirizine alone. If you are taking the cetirizine and pseudoephedrine combination product, read the information on the package label or ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
